class.name: fluxvla_franka_controllers/JointPositionController
class.description: A controller that executes a short motion based on joint positions to demonstrate correct usage

class.name: fluxvla_franka_controllers/CartesianImpedanceController
class.description: A controller that renders a spring damper system in cartesian space. Compliance parameters and the equilibrium pose can be modified online with dynamic reconfigure and an interactive marker respectively.

class.name: fluxvla_franka_controllers/RuckigJointPositionController
class.description: Jerk-limited online joint-position controller backed by ruckig with an input lookahead buffer and first-order target filtering. Subscribes to sensor_msgs/JointState on target_joint_state and writes smooth joint-position commands through PositionJointInterface.

class.name: fluxvla_franka_controllers/RuckigJointImpedanceController
class.description: Joint torque controller that accepts low-rate sensor_msgs/JointState targets on target_joint_state, smooths them with a small lookahead buffer and Ruckig, and outputs Franka follower-style joint PD torques. Publishes INACTIVE, SYNCING, and FOLLOWING on the state topic.
